```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.7em;text-align:center;">your first prompt</div>

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #3A7DC9;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.15em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.15);text-align:left;">

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#DCE9FA,#B5D0F0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;"><i data-lucide="message-square-quote" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">you →</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.7;font-family:'Georgia',serif;">
   Create a single-page HTML bio of Tom Hanks. One <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#C4881A;">index.html</code>, one <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#C4881A;">styles.css</code>. Big name headline, a short bio paragraph, three notable films. Clean modern look — serif headline, sans-serif body, one accent color. No JavaScript.
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,auto) 1fr;gap:0.4em;align-items:center;justify-content:start;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.25em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;">Read dir</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.25em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;">Write index.html</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#2C8475;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.25em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;">Write styles.css</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
